lessons.name: Unit 6: Vietnamese Lifestyles: Then and Now
lessons.chapter: Unit 6: Vietnamese Lifestyles: Then and Now
lessons.description: Learn about Vietnamese lifestyles with verb + to-infinitive and verb + V-ing.

theory.title: Unit 6: Vietnamese Lifestyles: Then and Now

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Past lifestyle: traditional, simple, rural, agricultural, farming, manual, handmade, natural, peaceful, slow-paced

Modern lifestyle: modern, urban, industrial, technological, automatic, machine-made, convenient, fast-paced, busy, stressful

Changes: change, develop, improve, modernize, transform, evolve, progress, advance

Activities then: farming, fishing, weaving, pottery, market, temple, festival, folk games

Activities now: shopping mall, cinema, internet, smartphone, social media, online shopping, video games

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about traditional and modern Vietnamese lifestyles.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Verb + to-infinitive & Verb + V-ing (Động từ + to V & Động từ + V-ing)

A. Verb + to-infinitive (Động từ + to V):

  • want, need, would like, plan, decide, hope, expect, promise, agree, refuse, offer, manage, fail, learn, try
  • Ex: I want to learn English.
  • Ex: She decided to go abroad.
  • Ex: They hope to visit Vietnam.

B. Verb + V-ing (Động từ + V-ing):

  • enjoy, love, like, prefer, hate, dislike, mind, avoid, finish, stop, keep, practice, suggest, consider, miss
  • Ex: I enjoy reading books.
  • Ex: She finished doing homework.
  • Ex: They avoid eating junk food.

C. Verb + to V hoặc V-ing (cùng nghĩa):

  • like, love, hate, prefer, start, begin, continue
  • Ex: I like to read / like reading books. (cùng nghĩa)
  • Ex: She started to work / started working.

D. Verb + to V hoặc V-ing (khác nghĩa):

  • remember:
  • remember + to V: nhớ phải làm gì (chưa làm)
  • Ex: Remember to lock the door. (nhớ khóa cửa nhé)
  • remember + V-ing: nhớ đã làm gì (đã làm rồi)
  • Ex: I remember locking the door. (tôi nhớ là đã khóa cửa)
  • forget:
  • forget + to V: quên làm gì (chưa làm)
  • Ex: I forgot to call him. (quên gọi)
  • forget + V-ing: quên đã làm gì (đã làm)
  • Ex: I'll never forget visiting Paris. (không quên chuyến thăm)
  • stop:
  • stop + to V: dừng lại để làm gì
  • Ex: I stopped to rest. (dừng lại để nghỉ)
  • stop + V-ing: dừng hẳn việc gì
  • Ex: I stopped smoking. (bỏ hút thuốc)
  • try:
  • try + to V: cố gắng làm gì
  • Ex: I tried to open the door. (cố mở cửa)
  • try + V-ing: thử làm gì
  • Ex: Try eating this. (thử ăn cái này)

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Verb + to-infinitive
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Động từ + to V
  • want, need, decide, hope, plan, promise, agree, refuse

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Verb + V-ing
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Động từ + V-ing
  • enjoy, love, like, hate, finish, stop, avoid, mind, practice

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Verb + to V hoặc V-ing (khác nghĩa)
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • remember/forget/stop/try + to V hoặc V-ing
  • Chú ý nghĩa khác nhau

examples.question: Remember ______ (lock) the door. (nhớ phải khóa)
examples.explanation: remember + to V = nhớ phải làm (chưa làm)

examples.question: I remember ______ (lock) the door. (nhớ đã khóa)
examples.explanation: remember + V-ing = nhớ đã làm (đã làm rồi)

examples.question: I stopped ______ (rest). (dừng lại để nghỉ)
examples.explanation: stop + to V = dừng lại để làm gì

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp các loại động từ
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định động từ chính
  • Chọn to V hoặc V-ing phù hợp
  • Chú ý nghĩa của câu

examples.question: I want ______ (learn) and I enjoy ______ (practice) English.
examples.solution: I want to learn and I enjoy practicing English.

examples.question: She decided ______ (stop) ______ (smoke).
examples.explanation: decide + to V; stop + V-ing (bỏ hút thuốc)

examples.question: Don't forget ______ (call) me. I'll never forget ______ (meet) you.
examples.solution: Don't forget to call me. I'll never forget meeting you.
examples.explanation: forget + to V (chưa làm); forget + V-ing (đã làm)

exercises.question: I want ______ English.
exercises.explanation: want + to V

exercises.question: She decided ______ abroad.
exercises.explanation: decide + to V

exercises.question: I enjoy ______ books.
exercises.explanation: enjoy + V-ing

exercises.question: She finished ______ homework.
exercises.explanation: finish + V-ing

exercises.question: They avoid ______ junk food.
exercises.explanation: avoid + V-ing

exercises.question: Remember ______ the door. (nhớ phải khóa)
exercises.explanation: remember + to V = nhớ phải làm (chưa làm)

exercises.question: I remember ______ the door. (nhớ đã khóa)
exercises.explanation: remember + V-ing = nhớ đã làm (đã làm rồi)

exercises.question: I stopped ______ a rest. (dừng lại để nghỉ)
exercises.explanation: stop + to V = dừng lại để làm gì

exercises.question: I stopped ______ . (bỏ hút thuốc)
exercises.explanation: stop + V-ing = dừng hẳn việc gì

exercises.question: They hope ______ Vietnam.
exercises.explanation: hope + to V

exercises.question: Which verbs are followed by to-infinitive? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: want + to V, decide + to V. Sai: enjoy + V-ing, finish + V-ing

exercises.question: Which verbs are followed by V-ing? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: enjoy + V-ing, finish + V-ing, avoid + V-ing. Sai: want + to V

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: Remember locking the door. (nhớ phải khóa)
I stopped to rest. (dừng lại để nghỉ)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: want to learn, enjoys reading, stopped to rest. Sai: Remember locking (phải là 'to lock' khi nghĩa là 'nhớ phải khóa')

exercises.question: Fill in: I want ______ (learn) English.
exercises.explanation: want + to V

exercises.question: Fill in: I enjoy ______ (read) books.
exercises.explanation: enjoy + V-ing

exercises.question: Fill in: Remember ______ (lock) the door. (nhớ phải khóa)
exercises.explanation: remember + to V = nhớ phải làm

exercises.question: Fill in: I stopped ______ (smoke). (bỏ hút thuốc)
exercises.explanation: stop + V-ing = dừng hẳn việc gì

exercises.question: Rearrange: want / I / to / learn / English / . / enjoy / I / reading / books / .
exercises.sample_answer: I want to learn English. I enjoy reading books.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: want + to V; enjoy + V-ing

exercises.question: Transform: She plans to visit Vietnam. She enjoys traveling. → Combine with 'and'
exercises.sample_answer: She plans to visit Vietnam and she enjoys traveling.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: plan + to V; enjoy + V-ing

exercises.question: Transform: Remember! You must lock the door. → Remember ______.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: must lock → remember + to lock (nhớ phải làm)

exercises.question: Rearrange: decided / She / to / stop / smoking / . / forgot / I / to / call / him / .
exercises.sample_answer: She decided to stop smoking. I forgot to call him.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: decide + to V; stop + V-ing; forget + to V

exercises.question: Transform and explain the difference: I stopped to smoke. vs I stopped smoking. (Explain both meanings in Vietnamese)
exercises.sample_answer: I stopped to smoke. = Tôi dừng lại để hút thuốc. (stop + to V = dừng lại để làm gì) I stopped smoking. = Tôi bỏ hút thuốc. (stop + V-ing = dừng hẳn việc gì)
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi và giải thích: stop + to V (dừng lại để làm gì) khác với stop + V-ing (dừng hẳn việc gì)
